texto: Still, I could not imagine how being poor could be worse than being rich and hating yourself. I had seen enough of what it was like to be dead. It was time to try living.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Patrick Kelly: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Still, I could not imagine how being poor could be worse than being rich and hating yourself. I h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, living, could pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
